summary.intent: Fix review comments on PR #484 in the moltis repo, specifically addressing hardcoded `/tmp` paths in tests and related issues.
summary.outcome: All three review comments were addressed: replaced hardcoded `/tmp` paths with `tempfile::tempdir()` in error-path tests, updated error message assertions, and all 37 parse tests pass. Changes committed and pushed.

repo: Tests in crates/skills/src/parse.rs previously used hardcoded /tmp paths, which could cause false positives if stray files like /tmp/_meta.json existed.
The project uses tempfile::tempdir() for temporary directory creation in tests.

code.finding: test_invalid_name_no_slug_rejected and test_invalid_name_with_invalid_slug_rejected were using Path::new('/tmp') instead of tempfile::tempdir(); error message assertions also needed updating to include the source path.

workflow: Review threads were fetched via Bash to enumerate unresolved comments before making fixes.
Resolve review threads after addressing each comment to keep PR clean.

friction: Multiple rounds of edits to the same file (parse.rs edited three times) suggest the full scope of changes wasn't captured in one pass.
